name: Stekt Marinert Makrell (Grilled Marinated Mac
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the backbones from the mackerel without cutting them in half, or have a fish dealer do it for you.
2. Preheat the broiler.
3. In a shallow baking dish large enough to hold the fish laid out flat in one layer, combine the olive oil, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and chopped onion.
4. Place the mackerel in this marinade, flesh side down, and marinate for 15 minutes.
5. Turn the mackerel over and marinate for another 15 minutes.
6. Brush the broiler grill with 1 tablespoon of melted butter and oil.
7. Place the mackerel on the broiler grill, skin side down. Grill only one side about 3 inches from the heat, basting occasionally with remaining butter and oil.
8. In 10 to 12 minutes, the fish should turn a light golden color and its flesh should flake easily when prodded with a fork. Serve immediately, accompanied by butter-steamed new potatoes and tomato or horse-radish butter.
